sentences.target: Je peux prendre un échantillon, s'il vous plaît.
sentences.reading: /ʒə pø pʁɑ̃dʁ‿œ̃ eʃɑ̃tijɔ̃, sil vu plɛ/

translations.fr: Je peux prendre un échantillon, s'il vous plaît.
translations.ipa: /ʒə pø pʁɑ̃dʁ‿œ̃ eʃɑ̃tijɔ̃, sil vu plɛ/
translations.en: Can I take a sample, please.
translations.de: Kann ich bitte eine Probe nehmen?
translations.it: Posso prendere un campione, per favore?
translations.yue: 可唔可以攞一個樣品，唔該？
translations.pt: Posso pegar uma amostra, por favor?
translations.vi: Tôi có thể lấy một mẫu được không?
translations.ar: هل يمكنني أخذ عينة من فضلك؟
translations.nl: Mag ik alstublieft een monster nemen?
translations.uk: Чи можу я взяти зразок, будь ласка?
translations.hi: क्या मैं एक नमूना ले सकता हूँ, कृपया?
translations.el: Μπορώ να πάρω ένα δείγμα, παρακαλώ;
translations.nb: Kan jeg få en prøve, takk?
translations.sv: Kan jag ta ett prov, tack?
translations.ro: Pot să iau o mostră, vă rog?
translations.da: Må jeg tage en prøve, tak?
translations.ja: サンプルをいただけますか。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Present indicative, 1st person singular of a modal verb; takes the infinitive 'prendre' as its complement.
Infinitive main verb; complements the modal 'peux'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determines 'échantillon'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'prendre'.
Elided subordinating conjunction before a vowel; part of the polite formula.
3rd person singular subject pronoun; impersonal subject in the expression 's'il vous plaît'.
2nd person plural/formal pronoun; indirect object of 'plaît', addressing the listener politely.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; completes the fixed polite expression.

translations.en: We’re saving the sample for tomorrow.
translations.de: Wir bewahren die Probe bis morgen auf.
translations.yue: 我哋將個樣品留到聽日。
translations.pt: Vamos guardar a amostra para amanhã.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi để mẫu lại cho ngày mai.
translations.nl: We bewaren het monster tot morgen.
translations.hi: हम नमूना कल के लिए बचाकर रख रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi sparer prøven til i morgen.
translations.sv: Vi sparar provet till i morgon.
translations.da: Vi gemmer prøven til i morgen.
translations.ja: サンプルは明日まで保管します。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun; commonly used as colloquial 'we'.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; main verb of the clause.
Elided definite article before a vowel, masculine singular; determines 'échantillon'.
Common noun; direct object of 'garde'.
Preposition indicating purpose or time target.
Temporal adverb; complement of 'pour' indicating when.

sentences.target: Ils comparent chaque échantillon avant de décider.
sentences.reading: /il kɔ̃paʁ ʃak eʃɑ̃tijɔ̃ avɑ̃ də deside/

translations.fr: Ils comparent chaque échantillon avant de décider.
translations.ipa: /il kɔ̃paʁ ʃak eʃɑ̃tijɔ̃ avɑ̃ də deside/
translations.en: They compare each sample before deciding.
translations.es: Comparan cada muestra antes de decidir.
translations.de: Sie vergleichen jede Probe, bevor sie entscheiden.
translations.it: Confrontano ogni campione prima di decidere.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们在做决定之前比较每个样品。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺決定之前會比較每個樣品。
translations.ru: Перед тем как принять решение, они сравнивают каждый образец.
translations.pt: Eles comparam cada amostra antes de decidir.
translations.he: הם משווים כל דגימה לפני שמחליטים.
translations.tr: Karar vermeden önce her örneği karşılaştırıyorlar.
translations.vi: Họ so sánh từng mẫu trước khi quyết định.
translations.ar: يقارنون كل عينة قبل أن يقرروا.
translations.nl: Ze vergelijken elk monster voordat ze beslissen.
translations.uk: Вони порівнюють кожен зразок перед тим, як вирішити.
translations.hi: फ़ैसला करने से पहले वे हर नमूने की तुलना करते हैं.
translations.pl: Porównują każdą próbkę, zanim podejmą decyzję.
translations.nb: De sammenligner hver prøve før de bestemmer seg.
translations.id: Mereka membandingkan setiap sampel sebelum memutuskan.
translations.sv: De jämför varje prov innan de bestämmer sig.
translations.ro: Ei compară fiecare mostră înainte de a decide.
translations.da: De sammenligner hver prøve, før de beslutter sig.
translations.fi: He vertailevat jokaista näytettä ennen kuin päättävät.
translations.ja: 決める前に、彼らはそれぞれのサンプルを比較します。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural.
Present indicative, 3rd person plural; main verb.
Distributive determiner; modifies 'échantillon'.
Common noun; direct object of 'comparent'.
Preposition introducing a non-finite clause ('avant de décider').
Preposition linking 'avant' to an infinitive; functions as an infinitival marker here.
Infinitive verb; complement of the prepositional chain 'avant de'.

sentences.target: Tu veux un échantillon de ce tissu.

translations.fr: Tu veux un échantillon de ce tissu.
translations.en: Do you want a sample of this fabric.
translations.de: Willst du ein Muster von diesem Stoff?
translations.it: Vuoi un campione di questa stoffa?
translations.zh-Hans: 你要这个布料的样品吗？
translations.yue: 你想要呢塊布嘅樣品嗎？
translations.pt: Você quer uma amostra deste tecido?
translations.tr: Bu kumaştan bir örnek ister misin?
translations.vi: Bạn có muốn một mẫu vải này không?
translations.ar: هل تريد عينة من هذا القماش؟
translations.nl: Wil je een staaltje van deze stof?
translations.hi: क्या तुम इस कपड़े का नमूना चाहते हो?
translations.el: Θέλεις δείγμα από αυτό το ύφασμα;
translations.nb: Vil du ha en prøve av dette stoffet?
translations.ro: Vrei o mostră din această țesătură?
translations.da: Vil du have en prøve af dette stof?
translations.ja: この生地のサンプルは欲しい？

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Present indicative, 2nd person singular; main verb expressing desire.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determines 'échantillon'.
Common noun; direct object of 'veux'.
Preposition introducing a nominal complement specifying material/source.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; agrees with 'tissu'.
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of 'de'.
